description: A dirt path flanked by towering velcro mountains. You can hear the gurgling of a sticky syrup river nearby. The air smells strangely of maple and old sneakers.

velcro_mountain.description: A massive mountain covered in scratchy hook-and-loop fasteners. You definitely can't climb this.

syrup_river.description: A slow-moving, golden river of sticky syrup.
syrup_river.effectMessage: The thick syrup sticks to your sole and burns with sugary heat!

dirt_path.description: A simple dirt trail leading eastward.

item_potato.description: A potato is stuck to a patch of velcro on the side of the path. It takes a good tug to pull it off.

bacon_strip.description: A piece of bacon lies on the ground, baking in the sun.

item.onCollect: You try a bite... BLERGH! It tastes like concrete! Freddista gives you a disgusted look. "You do know those have been out in the sun and been stepped on right?"

exit_west.description: The path leads back through the small crack to Shoeboxlandia Street.

exit_east.description: The path continues toward a massive structure made of cereal boxes in the distance.
